extDescription.message: A modern browser translation extension based on large language models, compatible with various LLM service providers.

options_subtitle.message: Configure your OpenAI-compatible translation providers and preferences

hint_api_key.message: If set, Authorization: Bearer header will be sent automatically. You can still override it in custom headers.

queue_description.message: Models are tried in order. If one fails, the next is automatically used as fallback.

hint_ui_language.message: Controls the language of this extension's UI

hint_native_language.message: Your native language. Translations will target this language.

hint_default_source_language.message: When the input language is your native language, translate into this.

hint_input_default_source_language.message: When input box content is your native language, translate into this first; leave blank to follow the default source language.

hint_google_free_detector.message: Public Google Translate endpoint, no API key required. Privacy notice: queries are sent to Google's servers — avoid sensitive content. May be unreachable or rate-limited in some regions.

lang_detect_description.message: franc-min is always used first. Additional API detectors are used as fallback when franc-min is uncertain.

style_original_desc.message: Replace text while preserving element structure

theme_indigo_desc.message: Elegant indigo to violet flow gradient, tech-forward feel

theme_aurora_desc.message: Fresh mint green to sky blue flow gradient, crisp and modern

theme_monochrome_desc.message: No-chroma slate gray flow, deeply immersive and zero distraction

theme_cosmic_desc.message: Warm rose pink to violet flow gradient, modern generative AI vibe

tone_literary_desc.message: Elegant language, rich vocabulary, preserves rhetoric

tone_formal_desc.message: Dignified, precise, suitable for formal contexts

hint_input_shortcut_key.message: Press three times to translate, then three times again to restore; default Space.

hint_input_loading_pulse_duration.message: Duration for one animation cycle. 800-1600 is usually comfortable.

hint_input_loading_pulse_easing.message: Controls the transition rhythm between keyframes.

error_required_fields.message: Name and Base URL are required

placeholder_provider_prompt.message: Leave empty to use global prompt...

hint_provider_prompt.message: Custom prompt for this provider. Supports {{sourceLang}}, {{targetLang}} variables. The source text is passed separately as the user message; do not embed it in the prompt.

desc_global_prompt.message: This prompt is used for all providers unless overridden.

desc_aggregate_enabled.message: Combine multiple paragraphs into a single translation request to improve efficiency.

hint_stream.message: When enabled, results are parsed incrementally via SSE. Note: long inputs may hit the request timeout — increase it in General settings if needed.

hint_extra_body_override.message: Standalone fields above take precedence over keys of the same name in this JSON.

hint_extra_body_examples.message:
Common fields:
• reasoning_effort (OpenAI): "none" / "low" / "medium" / "high" — set to "none" to disable reasoning
• enable_thinking (Anthropic Claude): false — disable extended thinking

hint_temperature.message: Controls randomness. Lower values make translations more precise and consistent (recommended 0~0.3); higher values produce more creative output.

hint_top_p.message: Nucleus sampling that controls word diversity. 1.0 considers all candidates; lower values are more conservative. Temperature alone is usually sufficient — no need to tweak both.

hint_max_tokens.message: Maximum tokens per response (1 token ≈ 0.75 English words or 1~2 Chinese characters). Increase if translations are being cut off.

hint_content_type_auto.message: Content-Type is injected automatically by the request layer; no need to set it here.

hint_export_passphrase.message: Leave empty to export plaintext JSON. With a passphrase, the export is encrypted with AES-GCM. The passphrase cannot be recovered if lost.

hint_export_passphrase_warn.message: API keys detected — encrypting the export is strongly recommended. Warning: a lost passphrase makes the export unrecoverable.

toast_export_encrypted_remember.message: Encrypted backup generated. Keep the passphrase safe — it cannot be recovered.

error_import_decrypt_failed.message: Decryption failed: wrong passphrase or corrupted file.

error_import_passphrase_required.message: This backup is encrypted. Please enter the passphrase to import.

desc_load_balance.message: When enabled, translation requests are distributed across multiple providers by weight. Toggle quickly from the Popup panel.

warn_no_lb_providers.message: Please select at least one provider for load balancing.

hint_load_balance.message: Requests are distributed proportionally by weight. If a provider fails, the next one is used automatically.

popup_load_balance_active.message: Load balancing active — requests distributed across providers

hint_model_order.message: Model order determines fallback priority. Models listed first are tried first.

desc_request_settings.message: Applies to all translation requests (both aggregate and non-aggregate).

hint_test_provider.message: Test the current provider by sending a random-language greeting. Result will be translated into your native language.
